name: personal-skills
description: Personal Codex skills maintained from the my-codex repository.

interface.shortDescription: Use personal Codex skills maintained in my-codex.
interface.longDescription: Personal Skills packages reusable personal Codex skills so they can be installed from the my-codex marketplace instead of being maintained directly under ~/.codex/skills.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use my personal Codex skills.
